sources.title: This week's new movies span every genre. - Facebook
Find New Movies by Genre at Cinemark

findings: This week's new movies span every genre. Movies like Carolina, Office Romance, Little Sister, and Masters of the Universe are releasing in theaters.

Cinemark makes it easy to find the perfect film by offering a wide range of genres including Action, Animation, Anime, Classics, Comedy, Concert Events, Crime, Documentary, Musical, Romance, Science Fiction, Sports, Thriller, and Western.
FilmCrave lists new movies released in theaters on June 6th, 2026, including Carolina, Office Romance, Little Sister, and Masters of the Universe.
